title: Lesson 53 (Vocab) - ペン, ピアノ, ページ...
description: ペン (Pen) and ページ (Page). パン (Bread) actually comes from Portuguese, not English!

items.gloss: bread; pastries (e.g. croissants); pastry-based products; pan; frying pan; panning (in a film)
pin (e.g. hairpin, bowling pin, golf pin, etc.); one (on dice, in cards, etc.); beginning; best; kickback
